allow: PowerShell($file = "C:\\Users\\gusta\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\todolist\\todo.pem"; $acl = Get-Acl $file; $rule = New-Object System.Security.AccessControl.FileSystemAccessRule\($env:USERNAME, "FullControl", "Allow"\); $acl.SetAccessRule\($rule\); Set-Acl $file $acl; Remove-Item $file -Force; Write-Output "Deletado")
